def positive_unittest_test_class_duplicates_setup_without_base_class():
    rule_id = "unittest_test_class_duplicates_setup_without_base_class"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Multiple unittest.TestCase subclasses in the same file duplicate setUp logic without extracting a base class."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
